# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    
    parameters {
        choice(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_SOURCE',
            choices: ['S3', 'ARTIFACTORY', 'HTTP'],
            description: 'Select the source of the build artifact'
        )
        string(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_URL',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'URL of the build artifact'
        )
        string(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_NAME',
            defaultValue: 'artifact.zip',
            description: 'Name of the artifact file'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DEPLOY_SERVERS',
            defaultValue: 'prod1.example.com,prod2.example.com',
            description: 'Comma separated list of production servers'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DEPLOY_PATH',
            defaultValue: '/opt/app',
            description: 'Deployment path on production servers'
        )
    }
    
    stages {
        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def artifactUrl = params.ARTIFACT_URL
                    def artifactName = params.ARTIFACT_NAME
                    
                    if (params.ARTIFACT_SOURCE == 'S3') {
                        withCredentials([aws(accessKeyVariable: 'AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID', secretKeyVariable: 'AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY')]) {
                            sh "aws s3 cp ${artifactUrl} ${artifactName}"
                        }
                    } else if (params.ARTIFACT_SOURCE == 'ARTIFACTORY') {
                        def artifactoryUrl = artifactUrl
                        def username = 'artifactory_user'
                        def password = 'artifactory_password'
                        withCredentials([usernamePassword(credentialsId: 'artifactory-credentials', usernameVariable: 'ARTIFACTORY_USER', passwordVariable: 'ARTIFACTORY_PASSWORD')]) {
                            sh "curl -u ${ARTIFACTORY_USER}:${ARTIFACTORY_PASSWORD} -o ${artifactName} ${artifactoryUrl}"
                        }
                    } else {
                        sh "curl -o ${artifactName} ${artifactUrl}"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = params.DEPLOY_SERVERS.split(',')
                    def deployPath = params.DEPLOY_PATH
                    def artifactName = params.ARTIFACT_NAME
                    
                    for (server in servers) {
                        server = server.trim()
                        echo "Deploying to ${server}"
                        
                        sh """
                            ssh ${server} "mkdir -p ${deployPath}"
                            scp ${artifactName} ${server}:${deployPath}/
                            ssh ${server} "cd ${deployPath} && unzip -o ${artifactName}"
                        """
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    post {
        success {
            echo 'Deployment completed successfully'
        }
        failure {
            echo 'Deployment failed'
        }
    }
}
